title: asplenium ruta-muraria var. cryptolepis
intro: Asplenium ruta-muraria var. cryptolepis, also known as Rock Cap fern or Wall Rue, is a rare and endemic species of fern found in the Mediterranean region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are believed to aid in wound healing and reducing pain. The health benefits of Asplenium ruta-muraria var. cryptolepis include its potential to treat skin conditions, such as eczema and acne, and its ability to act as an antioxidant, protecting cells from damage. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of infusions, tinctures, or salves, and is traditionally used to treat various ailments, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
